title: Tatto Master
intro: Tatto Master is a system of **passive skills** that permanently improve your character's stats. Skills are activated by obtaining the required materials and registering them in the system — no active casting needed once learned.
intro2: There are **4 pages** of tattoos covering a wide range of bonuses. Some are learned once and stay at a fixed level; others can be upgraded progressively as you reach higher zones and content.

figure.alt: Tatto Master panel showing skill list and levels
figure.caption: Tatto Master panel — 4 pages of passive skills, each showing current level and a View Stats button.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
steps: Open the Community Board (`Alt+B`) and select **Tatto Master**.
Browse the 4 pages of available tattoos using the **Next** button.
Click **View Stats** on any tattoo to see what it does and what materials it requires.
Farm the required materials and return to register the tattoo — the passive activates immediately.
For upgradeable tattoos, repeat with higher-tier materials to increase the level.

cells: Learned once — fixed passive bonus, no upgrade path
Can be upgraded through multiple levels — each level requires better materials and grants a stronger bonus

tables.title: Material Sources
tables.preText: Tattoo materials come from a variety of content — the harder the source, the stronger the tattoo it unlocks:

cells: Regular mob drops as you progress through zones
Event raid bosses and seasonal content

infoBoxes.label: 3 More Pages
infoBoxes.body: Page 1 of 4 is shown above. Use the **Next** button in the panel to browse the remaining tattoos — full details available via the **View Stats** button on each entry.

infoBoxes.label: Strategy
infoBoxes.body: Prioritise tattoos that match the content you are actively farming. If you spend a lot of time in catacombs, unlock **Catacomb Master** first. As you move into harder zones and instances, unlock and upgrade the relevant tattoos to stay efficient.
